query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A symmetrical close-up of an ornate vintage-style streetlamp featuring three spherical frosted glass globes arranged in a triangular formation around a central decorative post. The cast-iron fixture includes curved arms with scrollwork details and fluted metal accents. The background is uniformly dark, causing the illuminated spherical lights to appear as prominent bright circles. Reflective highlights trace the edges of the dark metal surfaces. A watermark appears in the lower right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A symmetrical close-up of an ornate vintage-style streetlamp featuring three spherical frosted glass globes arranged around a central decorative post, rendered in a muted, desaturated sepia palette with retro monotone brown tones. The spherical lights are subject to extreme overexposure, blown out into featureless bright white discs that erase all glass texture and create a stark graphic abstraction against the dark background. The cast-iron fixture with its curved arms, scrollwork, and fluted post is visible in deep shadowy browns. A watermark appears in the lower right corner.
